1.name: Breath of Whispers
1.description: A koldun uses the wind to communicate with a target over long distances.

1.name: Burebista's Throne
1.description: the koldun can send his senses soaring high into the air, or extend them beyond their body;

1.name: Call the Children
1.description: summons demons whose power is dependent on the level of the kraina. The demon has no physical body and cannot exist outside a ritually prepared space.

1.name: Danubian Voices
1.description: invokes a river spirit that can converse with the koldun , sharing whatever they know, or act as a messenger;

1.name: Domain Breach
1.description: The koldun becomes immediately aware if an intruder sets foot on their domain.

1.name: Fiery Courage
1.description: A koldun permanently diminishes the difficulty to resist Rötschreck regarding fire. Combust - A koldun causes a target to spontaneously combust.

1.name: Grasping Soil
1.description: A koldun can use dirt to immobilize a target.

1.name: Pool of Lies
1.description: A koldun creates detailed illusions on the water's surface.

1.name: Shroud of Oblivion
1.description: shedding his own skin, the koldun may cloak himself into a portable piece of the Shroud, lessening the dangers of sunlight.

1.name: The Frustrations of Nestretcha
1.description: A koldun makes it so that the target can not use willpower for successes or to use them for disciplines. This last for turns equal to the koldun's successes.

2.name: Biting Gale
2.description: A koldun creates frigid winds that slow or freeze a target.

2.name: Combust
2.description: A koldun causes a target to spontaneously combust. Magma Surge - A koldun causes magma to bubble up to the surface.

2.name: Endurance of Stone
2.description: A koldun can harden their flesh to the consistency of stone.

2.name: Fingers of Białowieża
2.description: The koldun commands plants to ensnare and obstruct intruders.

2.name: Grave of the Marea Neagra
2.description: imbues a body of water with protective properties against sunlight, natural deterioration and detection;

2.name: Heed the Hell-bound Heart
2.description: allows the koldun to sense any trace of demonic influence by drinking from his well.

2.name: Pietrosu's Hospitality
2.description: a powerful, frigid wind arises all around the koldun , but also makes him immune to cold and the force of winds;

2.name: Spectral Cloak
2.description: hides the koldun within the Shadowlands, making him invisible for those who cannot see ghosts.

2.name: The Insults of Krivda
2.description: A koldun causes a target to fly into an uncontrollable rage and target the koldun.

2.name: Watery Haven
2.description: A koldun may merge with water to protect themselves from the sun and foes, much as those who use Protean can merge with earth.

3.name: Aegis Alighieri
3.description: shields the koldun from attacks through demonic entities through the use of an amulet soaked in his own blood.

3.name: Breeze of Lethargy
3.description: A koldun summons winds that bring exhaustion.

3.name: Fog Over Sea
3.description: A koldun can walk on water.

3.name: Grondrska's Impasse
3.description: The koldun manipulates the vegetation to change ways through the forest.

3.name: Hungry Earth
3.description: A koldun can drag a target completely underground, smothering them.

3.name: Pond of Malevolent Dread
3.description: eviscerating himself, the koldun may channel the depths of the Sea of Shadows into a ring of wailing spectres to grasp at anyone in their reach.

3.name: Pontos Euxeinos
3.description: the koldun may submerge into a large enough body of water to heal his wounds;

3.name: The Banks of The Basca
3.description: bolsters the flow of running water, causing it to swell and surge forward creating a flash flood with magical life;

3.name: The Weeping of Kruchina
3.description: A koldun causes a target to cry uncontrollably in intense misery.

3.name: Wall of Magma
3.description: A koldun summons magma from deep beneath the earth to protect themselves.

4.name: Heat Wave
4.description: A koldun creates a blistering wind that can kill a target.

4.name: Heave the Host of Hell
4.description: dispels any traces of the infernal within the koldun's domain.

4.name: Kupala 's Exhalation
4.description: summons deadly cold (but highly flammable) gasses from the ground (that they claim to be the breath of Kupala himself).

4.name: Minions of Deep Marmora
4.description: splashing his blood upon the surface of water, the koldun may invoke strange humanoid creatures, combining the features of frog and fish to perform one task for him.

4.name: Minions of the Deep
4.description: A koldun summons water elementals to do his bidding.

4.name: Mouth of Djabalek
4.description: The koldun can trap victims underground and drain their blood.

4.name: Ride the Tempest
4.description: A koldun can ride the winds at incredible speeds to any destination.

4.name: Root of Vitality
4.description: Similar to Hungry Earth , except the target is now able to breathe underground and can be healed.

4.name: The Misfortune of Chernogolov
4.description: A koldun makes it so that the target loses two successes on every roll. This last for turns equal to the koldun's successes.

4.name: Wrath of the Tempest
4.description: allows the koldun to bring a piece of the Tempest into living world, conjuring a violent storm that throws anyone trapped within into a Harrowing .

5.name: Doom Tide
5.description: A koldun creates a massive whirlpool that can sink ships and drag targets to the depths.

5.name: Fury of the Night Sky
5.description: A koldun may project the full measure of his anger into the night sky. Churning gray clouds blot out stars and moon, unleashing spiraling gusts and a driving downpour of freezing rain. Lightning arcs overhead, each thunderous flash casting jagged shadows.

5.name: Hunger of the Void
5.description: by pulling out his own soul and tormenting it relentlessly, the koldun transforms it into a Nihil that sucks everything in its vicinity into it.

5.name: Kupala 's Fury
5.description: A koldun calls on Kupala to create a powerful earthquake.

5.name: Pontos Axeinos
5.description: dripping his blood into a large body of water, the koldun may manifest storms, whirlpools, fogs, and rocky barricades where there were none moments before.

5.name: Reap the Well
5.description: allows the koldun to enslave a demonic entity.

5.name: Restless Medias
5.description: by exercising his willpower, the koldun may create an earthquake.

5.name: The Starvation of Marena
5.description: A koldun can create a frosty gale that blast the victim and leaves him emaciated as if he had just survived the coldest of winters.

5.name: The White Tower
5.description: Creates a white Tower made from bone to act as a personal, mobile Haven within the koldun's domain.

5.name: Volcanic Blast
5.description: A koldun can create a volcanic geyser to erupt anywhere within their sight.

6.name: Radius of effect increases 10 miles per dot over level 5
